claims.subject: AcrAB-TolC
claims.evidence_span: Overexpression of AcrAB-TolC can occur after exposure to fluoroquinolones, leading to multidrug resistance

claims.subject: RamA
claims.evidence_span: expression of AcrAB-TolC in Salmonella is primarily regulated by the transcriptional activator RamA

claims.subject: ramR::aph (RamA overproduction)
claims.evidence_span: overproduction of RamA...resulted in a significantly higher mutation frequency and rate

claims.subject: gyrA mutants
claims.evidence_span: selecting gyrA mutants resistant to quinolones

claims.subject: soxR mutations
claims.evidence_span: soxR mutants can be selected after exposure to ciprofloxacin

claims.subject: soxR mutations
claims.evidence_span: produced multidrug-resistant (MDR) mutants, associated with mutations in soxR
